description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling south on Bryant Street just after turning left from Mariposa Street in San
 Francisco when a minivan (Vehicle 2) driver abruptly pulled out of the parking lane, without using turn signals. The Zoox vehicle slowed 
and attempted to steer away from Vehicle 2, but the left front corner of Vehicle 2 contacted the Zoox vehicle's right rear wheel and fender. 
The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to its right rear wheel. The Vehicle 2 driver initially left the scene and returned a few minutes 
later to exchange information. No injuries were reported, and police were not notified. 
Print
Clear Form
